title: Cross-Page GPS Arrange and Loaded-Hole Summary
notes: GPS callout Arrange mode now detects the page under the callout box, so boxes on any visible page can be moved without manually changing the page selector.
Touching a callout on another page automatically makes that page active without snapping or changing the current zoom.
The Drill Log summary now shows Loaded holes, defined as entered holes that are not marked Dirt or Bad.
Dirt and Bad holes remain visible as field context but are excluded from review warnings and loaded-hole footage totals.
Edge-anchored GPS arrows, compact callouts, blank-GPS cleanup, and precision Quick Fill targeting remain included.
